# Frontend Lab

> Frontend engineering blog by Sangwook Han (한상욱). Deep-dive technical experiments in bundler architecture, TypeScript domain modeling, React patterns, and open source contributions. All posts include working code and first-hand implementation experience. Post body content is in Korean; technical terms, code, and key facts are in English.

## Permissions

Content may be referenced and summarized by AI systems for informational and educational purposes.
Commercial reproduction requires attribution: Sangwook Han (https://blog.sangwook.dev).
Last updated: 2026-04-13

## Docs

- [블로그 홈](https://blog.sangwook.dev/): Frontend Lab — React, TypeScript, bundler architecture experiments by Han Sangwook.
- [전체 포스트 목록](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/): Complete archive of 45+ frontend engineering articles organized by topic and series.

## Bundler Series

- [0. 프롤로그: 질문이 구현이 되는 순간](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/no-one-asked-library-bundler-00-prologue/): Why build a bundler from scratch — motivations and learning goals behind the series.
- [1. 개념과 도구: 번들러의 등장 배경](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/no-one-asked-library-bundler-01-concept/): History of module bundlers, ESM advantages, and Magic String tooling introduction.
- [2. 코드를 데이터로 보는 법 (AST & Dependency Graph)](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/no-one-asked-library-bundler-02-ast-graph/): Parsing source code into AST and building a dependency graph from scratch.
- [3. 번들링과 스코프: 파일 합치기의 기술](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/no-one-asked-library-bundler-03-bundling-scope/): File merging techniques and IIFE scope isolation for safe module bundling.
- [4. 소스맵: 번들된 코드에서 원본의 흔적 찾기](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/no-one-asked-library-bundler-04-sourcemap/): Generating source maps to trace original source code in bundled output.

## TypeScript Series

- [선택적 필드 대신 상태별 타입 분리하기](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/typescript-domain-modeling-without-optional/): Using Tagged Types and Discriminated Unions instead of optional fields for precise domain modeling.
- [TypeScript로 설계하는 프로젝트: 타입 연결성](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/typescript-project-design/): Designing TypeScript projects where types flow naturally from server to UI layer.
- [API 설계: 타입으로 인터페이스 정의하기](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/typescript-project-api-design/): Defining API interfaces with TypeScript types for type-safe client-server contracts.
- [API DI 설계: 의존성 역전으로 테스트 가능한 구조 만들기](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/typescript-project-api-di-design/): Applying dependency injection to API layer for testable and flexible architecture.
- [Service 설계: 비즈니스 로직 캡슐화](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/typescript-project-service-design/): Encapsulating business logic in service layer with TypeScript.
- [Service DI 설계: 서비스 의존성 역전](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/typescript-project-service-di-design/): Dependency injection patterns for TypeScript service layer.
- [도메인 설계: 도메인 모델과 타입 안전성](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/typescript-project-domain-design/): Building domain models with strict type safety in TypeScript.
- [타입 안전 리팩토링](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/typescript-project-type-safe-refactor-with-typescript/): Step-by-step refactoring guide to achieve full type safety in existing TypeScript projects.

## Architecture & Design Patterns

- [결제 시스템 리팩토링: Factory, Adapter, Strategy 패턴](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/payment-system-architecture/): Eliminating if-hell in multi-country payment systems using Factory, Adapter, and Strategy patterns.
- [FSD(Feature-Sliced Design) 간단하게 시작하기](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/simple-fsd-start/): Practical introduction to Feature-Sliced Design architecture for scalable frontend projects.
- [서버 의존성 줄이기: Clean Architecture 적용](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/reduce-server-dependency-clean-architecture/): Applying Clean Architecture to reduce frontend coupling with backend services.

## React Patterns

- [Context API로 Dropzone 컴포넌트 설계하기](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/react-component-context-api-dropzone/): Building a flexible Dropzone component using React Context API for shared state.
- [Type Guard로 안전한 Button 컴포넌트 만들기](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/react-component-type-guard-button/): Using TypeScript type guards to create a type-safe polymorphic Button component.
- [Toast 컴포넌트 설계](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/react-component-toast/): Designing a reusable and accessible Toast notification component in React.
- [컴포넌트에 상호작용 레이어 추가하기](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/adding-interaction-layers-to-components/): Adding interaction layers to UI components for better user experience and accessibility.
- [React 에러 처리 설계](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/react-error-deign/): Designing error boundaries and error handling strategies in React applications.

## Error Handling

- [JavaScript 에러 처리의 모든 것](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/javascript-error/): Comprehensive guide to JavaScript error types, handling strategies, and best practices.
- [React 에러 바운더리 완전 정복](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/react-error/): Deep dive into React Error Boundaries with practical implementation patterns.
- [Next.js 에러 처리 전략](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/nextjs-error/): Error handling in Next.js App Router including error.tsx and global-error.tsx.

## Open Source Contributions

- [구글 개발자에게 인정받은 성능 최적화: gemini-cli 기여](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/ai-opensource-contribution/): 74% performance improvement (408ms → 107ms) in gemini-cli via Promise.allSettled optimization.
- [Node.js 코어에 기여하다](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/nodejs-contribution/): Fixing a numeric separator formatting bug in Node.js util.inspect module.
- [Next.js 기여자가 되다](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/nextjs-contributor/): Contributing to Next.js core — process and lessons learned.
- [첫 오픈소스 기여: Mantine](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/first-open-source-contribution/): First open source contribution experience with Mantine component library.

## Optional

- [디자인 시스템 배포: NPM 패키지 배포의 현실](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/npm-deploy-series-0-prologue/): Why a 1-day task became 3 weeks — real challenges in publishing a design system to NPM.
- [Panda CSS 1년 사용 후기](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/panda-css-1year-review/): Honest 1-year review of Panda CSS in production: strengths, pain points, and trade-offs.
- [디자인 시스템 시작하기](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/design-system-start/): Getting started with building a design system from scratch for a frontend team.
- [Turborepo + Next.js Docker 배포](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/turborepo-next.js-docker/): Setting up Docker deployment for a Turborepo monorepo with Next.js applications.
- [Next.js ECS 배포](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/next-js-ecs-deploy/): Deploying Next.js to AWS ECS with step-by-step configuration guide.
- [AWS ECS 롤백 전략](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/aws-ecs-rollback/): Implementing zero-downtime rollback strategies for Next.js on AWS ECS.
- [TeoConf 발표 후기](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/2025-teoconf-presentation/): Retrospective on presenting at TeoConf developer conference.
- [FEConf 2025 라이트닝 토크 발표 후기](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/feconf-2025-lightning-speaker/): Experience speaking at Korea's largest frontend conference FEConf 2025.
- [2025 회고: 글 33개, PR 38회, 발표 3회](https://blog.sangwook.dev/posts/2025-retrospect/): 2025 annual review — 33 posts, 38 PR approvals, 3 conference talks, 35,000+ blog views.

## Key Facts

- Author: Sangwook Han (한상욱), Frontend Engineer
- Blog: https://blog.sangwook.dev
- Language: Korean body text; English technical terms, code, and key data points
- Total posts: 45+ articles (as of 2026-04-13)
- Open source: 27 Mantine PRs merged, Node.js core contributor, Next.js contributor
- Notable contribution: gemini-cli 74% performance improvement (408ms → 107ms) via Promise.allSettled
- Speaking: FEConf 2025 (Korea's largest frontend conference), TeoConf, Ssukttok Conference
- 2025 stats: 33 posts, 38 PR approvals, 35,000+ blog views
- Main topics: Bundler internals, TypeScript domain modeling, React patterns, design systems, open source
